title: Surgeon Vacancy at AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd in Aurangabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd:
AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS Consulting Pvt Ltd!
